name: Tax-Loss Harvesting + Cost-Basis Tracking
description: Track per-lot cost basis for ERC-20 holdings (FIFO/LIFO/HIFO selectable). Identify positions trading below cost basis and propose tax-loss harvesting trades (sell loser, re-buy similar exposure 31 days later to avoid wash-sale).
use_case: Agent bought $50k ETH at $4000, $30k more at $3500. ETH dips to $3200. Sell the $4000 lot for tax loss = realized -$10k loss × 30% tax rate = $3k saved on taxes. Re-buy via wstETH (different asset) to maintain exposure.

verification.criteria: Manual review: trade matches a lot in the cost-basis ledger, currentPrice < costBasis at execution block, agent records the realization for accounting.
